metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Bmvpc SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Bmvpc SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-bmvpc
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common bmvpc
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.ForwardMode
documentation:
转发模式，其中0表示IP方式，1表示网段方式；通过cidr方式可支持更多的IP接入到NAT网关
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.VpcId
documentation:
私有网络ID，例如：vpc-kd7d06of
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.NatName
documentation:
NAT名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.MaxConcurrent
documentation:
并发连接数规格；取值为1000000、3000000、10000000，分别对应小型、中型、大型NAT网关
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.SubnetIds
documentation:
子网ID列表，子网下全部IP将加入NAT，不区分网关转发方式
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.IpInfoSet
documentation:
部分IP信息，子网下只有该部分IP将加入NAT，仅当网关转发模式为IP方式有效；IpInfoSet和SubnetIds中的子网ID不能同时存在
\:rtype: list of IpInfo

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.AssignedEips
documentation:
已分配的EIP列表, AssignedEips和AutoAllocEipNum至少输入一个
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.AutoAllocEipNum
documentation:
新建EIP数目，系统将会按您的要求生产该数目个数EIP, AssignedEips和AutoAllocEipNum至少输入一个
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.CreateNatGatewayRequest.Exclusive
documentation:
独占标识，取值为0和1，默认值为0；0和1分别表示创建共享型NAT网关和独占NAT型网关；由于同一个VPC网络内，指向NAT集群的默认路由只有一条，因此VPC内只能创建一种类型NAT网关；创建独占型NAT网关时，需联系对应架构师进行独占NAT集群搭建，否则无法创建独占型NAT网关。
\:rtype: int
CreateNatGateway请求参数结构体

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.SubnetName
documentation:
子网名称，可任意命名，但不得超过60个字符
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.CidrBlock
documentation:
子网网段，子网网段必须在VPC网段内，相同VPC内子网网段不能重叠
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.DistributedFlag
documentation:
是否开启子网分布式网关，默认传1，传0为关闭子网分布式网关。关闭分布式网关子网用于云服务器化子网，此子网中只能有一台物理机，同时此物理机及其上子机只能在此子网中
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.DhcpEnable
documentation:
是否开启dhcp relay ，关闭为0，开启为1。默认为0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.DhcpServerIp
documentation:
DHCP SERVER 的IP地址数组。IP地址为相同VPC的子网内分配的IP
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.IpReserve
documentation:
预留的IP个数。从该子网的最大可分配IP倒序分配N个IP 用于DHCP 动态分配使用的地址段
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.VlanId
documentation:
子网绑定的vlanId。VlanId取值范围为2000-2999。创建物理机子网，VlanId默认为5; 创建docker子网或者虚拟子网，VlanId默认会分配2000--2999未使用的数值。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.Zone
documentation:
黑石子网的可用区
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bmvpc.v20180625.models.SubnetCreateInputInfo.IsSmartNic
documentation:
是否25G子网，1为是，0为否。
\:rtype: int
创建子网时的子网类型
